title: pelargonium tricolor
intro: Pelargonium tricolor, also known as African Geranium, is a plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its vibrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats due to its antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium tricolor include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
